analysis_commentary: self_play_target_tau 0.8→0.6 regressed: illegal_min 0.76 vs 0.49 (worse), illegal_last 0.97 vs 0.50 (near-collapse), aboveU dropped 5→2 peak and 5→0 final. max ceiling slightly better (0.24 vs 0.29). Sharper endgames reduced replay-buffer diversity so policy head couldn't consolidate; training unlearned mid-run progress. Grad norm elevated (63 vs 37). Clear regression on primary goal.
